title: anthemis macrotis
intro: Anthemis macrotis, also known as large leaf chamomile, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Anthemis macrotis are attributed to its essential oils, which contain anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of Anthemis macrotis can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to calm skin irritations and promote relaxation.
